'''zozhalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:epaenetic|epaenetic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-zh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:epaenetic|epaenetic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zozhalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozhalithi|zozhalithi]] || [[word:zozhaliji|zozhaliji]] || [[word:zozhalishi|zozhalishi]] || [[word:zozhaliki|zozhaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozhaluthuthu|zozhaluthuthu]] || [[word:zozhalujuju|zozhalujuju]] || [[word:zozhalushushu|zozhalushushu]] || [[word:zozhalukuku|zozhalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozhaluthu|zozhaluthu]] || [[word:zozhaluju|zozhaluju]] || [[word:zozhalushu|zozhalushu]] || [[word:zozhaluku|zozhaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozhalufthuf|zozhalufthuf]] || [[word:zozhalufjuf|zozhalufjuf]] || [[word:zozhalufshuf|zozhalufshuf]] || [[word:zozhalufkuf|zozhalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozhalethe|zozhalethe]] || [[word:zozhaleje|zozhaleje]] || [[word:zozhaleshe|zozhaleshe]] || [[word:zozhaleke|zozhaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozhalothotho|zozhalothotho]] || [[word:zozhalojojo|zozhalojojo]] || [[word:zozhaloshosho|zozhaloshosho]] || [[word:zozhalokoko|zozhalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozhalotho|zozhalotho]] || [[word:zozhalojo|zozhalojo]] || [[word:zozhalosho|zozhalosho]] || [[word:zozhaloko|zozhaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozhalofthof|zozhalofthof]] || [[word:zozhalofjof|zozhalofjof]] || [[word:zozhalofshof|zozhalofshof]] || [[word:zozhalofkof|zozhalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozhalïfthïf|zozhalïfthïf]] || [[word:zozhalïfjïf|zozhalïfjïf]] || [[word:zozhalïfshïf|zozhalïfshïf]] || [[word:zozhalïfkïf|zozhalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozhalïfthïfthïf|zozhalïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zozhalïfjïfjïf|zozhalïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zozhalïfshïfshïf|zozhalïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zozhalïfkïfkïf|zozhalïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozhalïfthïf|zozhalïfthïf]] || [[word:zozhalïfjïf|zozhalïfjïf]] || [[word:zozhalïfshïf|zozhalïfshïf]] || [[word:zozhalïfkïf|zozhalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozhalïfthïf|zozhalïfthïf]] || [[word:zozhalïfjïf|zozhalïfjïf]] || [[word:zozhalïfshïf|zozhalïfshïf]] || [[word:zozhalïfkïf|zozhalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozhalæthæ|zozhalæthæ]] || [[word:zozhalæjæ|zozhalæjæ]] || [[word:zozhalæshæ|zozhalæshæ]] || [[word:zozhalækæ|zozhalækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozhalathatha|zozhalathatha]] || [[word:zozhalajaja|zozhalajaja]] || [[word:zozhalashasha|zozhalashasha]] || [[word:zozhalakaka|zozhalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozhalatha|zozhalatha]] || [[word:zozhalaja|zozhalaja]] || [[word:zozhalasha|zozhalasha]] || [[word:zozhalaka|zozhalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozhalafthaf|zozhalafthaf]] || [[word:zozhalafjaf|zozhalafjaf]] || [[word:zozhalafshaf|zozhalafshaf]] || [[word:zozhalafkaf|zozhalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zozhalasha|zozhalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zozhalshësha|zozhalshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zozhalrosha|zozhalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zozhalmusha|zozhalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zozhalyasha|zozhalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozozhalnkshësha|gozozhalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozozhalnkrosha|gozozhalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozozhalnkmusha|gozozhalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozozhalnkyasha|gozozhalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zozhazhalasha|zozhazhalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zozhazhalshësha|zozhazhalshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zozhazhalrosha|zozhazhalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zozhazhalmusha|zozhazhalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zozhazhalyasha|zozhazhalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozozhazhalnkshësha|gozozhazhalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozozhazhalnkrosha|gozozhazhalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozozhazhalnkmusha|gozozhazhalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozozhazhalnkyasha|gozozhazhalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zezhælasha|zezhælasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zezhælshësha|zezhælshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zezhælrosha|zezhælrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zezhælmusha|zezhælmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zezhælyasha|zezhælyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozezhælnkshësha|gozezhælnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozezhælnkrosha|gozezhælnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozezhælnkmusha|gozezhælnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozezhælnkyasha|gozezhælnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zozhfalasha|zozhfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zozhfalshësha|zozhfalshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zozhfalrosha|zozhfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zozhfalmusha|zozhfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zozhfalyasha|zozhfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozozhfalnkshësha|gozozhfalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozozhfalnkrosha|gozozhfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozozhfalnkmusha|gozozhfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozozhfalnkyasha|gozozhfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
